reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the spec and scenario-normalizer gate claim satisfied; do not claim full verify was run in this evidence slice.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names checked-in lint gates and scenario-normalizer runtime completeness, which are deterministic script and test behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by `npm run lint:specs`, `npm run lint:scenario-normalizers`, and the verify runner test proving both gates remain in the checked-in verify phase list.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep lint and verify phase tests aligned when spec routing, surface/preset vocabulary, or scenario normalizer command families change.
